description: Full PQC — ML-DSA-44 auth + ML-KEM-768 key exchange + PQ-TLS transport

oracle.description: Dolev-Yao attacker with break_dh quantum oracle
oracle.quantum_oracle: break_dh equation active (inapplicable — no DH in protocol)
oracle.channel_model: Both ch and ch_tls are public — attacker has full Dolev-Yao control over all channels

oracle_analysis.oracle_blocked_by: No ECDH operations in protocol — oracle has no applicable terms
oracle_analysis.interpretation: HNDL-resistant: protocol uses ML-KEM exclusively for key exchange. break_dh oracle is vacuously inapplicable

pfs.description: Phase-separated PFS test: single session, signing keys revealed in phase 1, no break_dh
